title: AVLASH® [25 Pack 450ml - 16oz Round Stackable Plastic Food Container Set With Lids - Reusable, Leakproof, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, BPA Free Meal Prep Containers
features: 𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐔𝐌 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: Avlash Clear plastic round containers are designed to be leakproof and are great for food storage. The containers are air tight and keep food fresh for longer. These containers are great for parties, barbecues, summer festivals, and picnics and all kinds of celebrations
𝐒𝐔𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐑 𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘: Our round plastic food containers are made from extra strong plastic. Lightweight and sturdy yet flexible food safety standard plastic.

𝐁𝐏𝐀 𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐑𝐄𝐔𝐒𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄: These strong plastic containers are eco-friendly and reusable. Completely non-toxic and BPA-free, our plastic containers are a safe, cost-effective alternative to traditional glass containers

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐔𝐒𝐀𝐆𝐄: These containers can be used to store food in freezers. Use in your home, out on a picnic, parties, at the swimming pool, on a camping trip. The containers are dishwasher safe, microwave safe and made from BPA free plastic.

𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐒𝐅𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐆𝐔𝐀𝐑𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐄: Our round plastic containers can typically withstand temperatures between -20 degree C and 105 degree C. These can be readily recycled and disposed of easily at the end of the events which will give you 100% satisfaction.
description: Product Description Avlash [25 Pack] 450ml - 16oz Round Plastic Food Container Set With Lids. Avlash clear strong plastic round containers comes with strong clear plastic. Our containers are made from high clarity, strong plastic flexible polypropylene for improved crack resistance, the containers are strong and rigid but yet flexible enough. These containers are made from high-quality food-grade plastic and will not crack or break. These plastic containers are ideal for busy restaurants and for meal prep and BBQs & events saving time washing & pouring. Can be used also in your home, out on a picnic, companion for parties, summer festivals, at the swimming pool, on a camping trip. Manufactured under strict hygienic conditions the tumblers are sleeved to stay them clean and dust-free.
